occasion_factor_rule: if occasion_slugs is empty: 1.0. else: max(brain.occasion_affinity[slug] for slug in occasion_slugs). missing affinity entries default to 0.5 (neutral).

two_cd_diagnostic_gate.trigger: second-highest score is within 0.15 of the primary score
two_cd_diagnostic_gate.behavior: include both brains as 'two-cd diagnostic'. The brief generates two parallel direction candidates; brand-side strategist or human reviewer picks the stronger.
two_cd_diagnostic_gate.rationale: Anti-sameness — prevents the formula from collapsing into one default brain that overfits a sector.

minimum_score_floor.behavior: if no brain scores above 0.10, route to human review with reason 'cd_routing_no_signal'. Brief is likely under-specified.

ramadan.reason: Authenticity + heritage register lands hardest in Ramadan content.

eid_al_fitr.reason: Eid joy is communal and family-rooted — Firaasa (cultural insight) + Authenticity fit.

eid_al_adha.reason: Reverent, family-hospitality register favors heritage + authenticity.

saudi_national_day.reason: National pride wants heritage anchoring AND fresh metaphor — both, together.

saudi_founding_day.reason: Founding Day is heritage-deep; the Heritage Decoder leads strongly.

extra.keying: sector×occasion + brand cd_routing_weights (the WHAT); the dev team keys to archetype×stage×intent (the HOW)
